notes: Air-logistics and covert-resupply specialist base — the map's sole example of its kind, the aerial counterpart to the ground logistics specialist. Most of its aircraft production is non-combat, aside from a fragile, low-capacity stand-off harasser; a small infantry line keeps it from being a total pushover garrison-wise. Comes with a landing-pad building already in place, since its whole roster benefits from fuel-free landing, and gets a boost to fuel production reflecting how fuel-hungry that aircraft roster is.
